# mountOS Admin SDK — TypeScript API Reference

Generated from [api.yaml](../api.yaml). Do not edit.

- Package: `@mountos-io/admin-sdk`
- Spec version: `1`
- Base path: `/api/v1`

## Quick Start

```typescript
import { createServerClient } from "@mountos-io/admin-sdk";

const client = createServerClient({
  baseUrl: "https://appserv.example.com",
  privateKey: "<base64 ED25519 key>",
});
```

Browser apps use `createClient(request)` with a custom `RequestFn`. See `README.md`.

## Response Envelope

All SDK methods return the unwrapped `data` payload and throw `MountOSError` on `status="failure"`.

```typescript
type StandardResponse<T> = {
  status: "success" | "failure";
  message: string;
  data?: T;
  errorCode?: number;
};

type PaginatedResponse<T> = { items: T[]; pagination: PaginationMeta };
type CursorResponse<T>   = { items: T[]; nextCursor: number | null };
type PaginationMeta      = { page: number; limit: number; total: number; totalPages: number };
```

## Error Codes

| Code  | Name                          |
|-------|-------------------------------|
| 10001 | AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED |
| 10002 | INVALID_SESSION |
| 10003 | INVALID_CREDENTIALS |
| 10004 | SESSION_EXPIRED |
| 10200 | INVALID_REQUEST_FORMAT |
| 10201 | VALIDATION_FAILED |
| 10202 | MISSING_PARAMETER |
| 10900 | INTERNAL_ERROR |
| 10901 | SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE |
| 10902 | DATABASE_ERROR |

## Enums

### `ClientSessionStatus`

```typescript
type ClientSessionStatus = "connected" | "active" | "unhealthy" | "disconnected" | "expired" | "unknown";
```

### `LicenseQuotaState`

```typescript
type LicenseQuotaState = "ok" | "exceeded";
```

### `LicenseStatus`

```typescript
type LicenseStatus = "valid" | "expiring" | "grace" | "expired_access" | "expired";
```
